name: Grilled Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: Spanish onion, cut into large chunks
1 package Lipton Recipe Secrets Italian Herb with Tomato Soup Mix
Uncooked penne (8 oz), cooked and drained
Red wine vinegar, apple cider vinegar, or white vinegar (1/4 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange zucchini and onion on a broiler pan.
2. Brush with Italian Herb Tomato Soup Mix blended with oil.
3. Grill or broil for 5 minutes or until golden and crisp-tender.
4. In a bowl, toss cooked pasta, vegetables, roasted peppers, and vinegar.
5. Serve warm or at room temperature. Makes about 4 main dish or 8 side dish servings.
